series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to license applications, renewal forms, Division memorandum or correspondence associated with an Ohio home inspector license application.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Paper records are imaged and indexed upon Division receipt. Upon confirmation paper records are properly imaged and indexed ; Electronic: Any records maintained in machine readable format are retained from date of receipt by Division and ; Microform: Any records maintained in microform are retained from date of receipt by Division and
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred
